zh.lifeSummary: 當Miles de Ghisnes於大約0972年出生在法國諾門迪曼其維時，他的父親Comte De Ghisnes Gallus Guillaume de Vere44歲，母親Gertrude de Clermont39歲。他於0999年與Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne在英國諾福爾可登哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1037年12月18日在法國可斯可瑟-度-素德孔戴享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Miles de Ghisnes于大约0972年出生在法国諾門迪曼其維时，他的父亲Comte De Ghisnes Gallus Guillaume de Vere44岁，母亲Gertrude de Clermont39岁。他于0999年与Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne在英国諾福爾可登哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1037年12月18日在法国可斯可瑟-度-素德孔戴享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Miles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin but uncertain derivation. Unlike most Norman names it is, as far as can be ascertained, not derived from any known Old French or Germanic name element. It may be a greatly altered pet form of Michael , which came to be associated with the Latin word miles ‘soldier’ because of the military attributes of the archangel Michael. However, the usual Latin form of the name in the Middle Ages was Milo. There is a common Slavic name element mil ‘grace, favour’, with which it may possibly have some connection. The name has been in regular use in England since the 16th century. See also Milo and Myles .

en.lifeSummary: When Miles de Ghisnes was born about 0972, in Ver, Manche, Normandy, France, his father, Comte De Ghisnes Gallus Guillaume de Vere, was 44 and his mother, Gertrude de Clermont, was 39. He married Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne in 0999, in Hedenham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 18 December 1037, in Conte, Corse-du-Sud, Corsica, France, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Miles de Ghisnes est né environ 0972, à Ver, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Comte De Ghisnes Gallus Guillaume de Vere, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Gertrude de Clermont, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne en 0999, à Hedenham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 décembre 1037, à Conte, Corse-du-Sud, Corse, France, à l’âge de 66 ans.

Er hat 0999 in Hedenham, Norfolk, England Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. ko.lifeSummary: Miles de Ghisnes(이)가 대략 0972년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 베르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte De Ghisnes Gallus Guillaume de Vere(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude de Clermont(은)는 39세였다. 그는 0999년 영국 노르폴크 헤데함에서 Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1037년 12월 18일 프랑스 코르스 코르세-드-수드 콘트에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne em 0999, em Hedenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Miles de Ghisnes родился около 0972 г. в местности вир, манч, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte De Ghisnes Gallus Guillaume de Vere было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Gertrude de Clermont, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Petronilla Boleine de Boulogne в 0999 г. в местности хеденам, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 декабря 1037 г. в местности конт, корсе-ду-суд, корс, Франция в возрасте 66 лет.
